title: Where to allocate ₹10 lakh in current market scenario — a guide for conservative, moderate and aggressive investors
summary: Investors reassess asset allocation strategies amid market volatility, focusing on equity, debt, gold, and cash based on their risk appetite and goals. Here's a complete guide to allocate ₹10 lakh in the current market scenario for different investor profiles.

title: Post office savings rules revised: PAN made mandatory for deposits, withdrawals — new regulations explained
summary: The Department of Posts now requires depositors to quote their PAN for all specified financial activities

title: Income tax calendar for May 2026: Check key dates, deadlines for TDS and TCS
summary: From the mandatory deposit of Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) and Tax Collected at Source (TCS) for April 2026 to the issuance of vital certificates and filing of key financial statements, numerous due dates are set throughout the month.

title: Sebi plans CKYC 2.0 rollout in July: Experts decode impact on investors and borrowers
summary: Unified KYC is being designed on the lines of the Centre's ‘One Nation One KYC’ plan. Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman also recently spoke about this while speaking at Sebi's foundation day event last month.

title: What happens to a PPF account after the account holder’s death? Nominee rules, withdrawal process explained
summary: After the account holder's death, PPF account closes, and the nominee or legal heir can claim the balance. The account continues to earn interest until the claim is settled, but no new contributions can be made posthumously.

title: 8th Pay Commission to meet railway and defence stakeholders on 13-14 May: Here's how you can participate
summary: The meetings will prioritise pensioners, associations, and stakeholders representing personnel from railways and defence.

title: Money management: Top five lessons Indian mothers taught us long before financial advisors did
summary: Indian mothers have long instilled money management lessons in their children, focusing on disciplined spending, saving, and prioritizing education.&nbsp;

title: What happens to your PPF account if you move abroad? NRI rules explained
summary: NRIs can keep their PPF accounts active, but cannot open new ones. They must maintain a minimum deposit and cannot extend the tenure beyond 15 years. Here's how the proceeds are handled, among other rules you should be aware of.

title: FD at PSU banks vs private banks vs SFBs – How much can ₹5 lakh earn in 5 years? Check best rates here
summary: Bank of Baroda offers the highest 5-year FD rate among PSU banks at 6.30%. DCB Bank leads private banks with 7.25%, while Suryoday Small Finance Bank tops SFBs at 7.90%. Fixed deposits remain popular for their predictability and safety.

title: DA hike calculator: When is next Dearness allowance hike? How much to expect? How it will impact your salary
summary: On April 18, the Centre raised the dearness allowance for employees by 2%, increasing it to 60%. The next DA hike is expected in July 2026, with a potential increase of 2-3% depending on inflation trends, benefiting approximately 50.46 lakh employees and 68.27 lakh pensioners.

title: MCX Q4 Results: Cons PAT soars 291% YoY to Rs 530 crore, revenue triples; Rs 8 per share dividend announced
summary: MCX Q4 Results: Multi Commodity Exchange of India (MCX) reported a consolidated net profit at Rs 530 crore for the March-ended quarter versus Rs 135 crore in the year ago period, implying a 291% YoY surge. The profit after tax (PAT) is attributable to the owners of the company.

title: Goldman Sachs' private credit fund cuts value by 3.7%
summary: Goldman Sachs BDC reported net asset value ​per share (NAV) of $12.17 at the end of March, which is roughly 3.7% lower than the ​previous quarter, it said in a late Thursday filing.

title: Arisinfra Solutions posts FY26 revenue of Rs 1,067 crore
summary: Arisinfra Solutions reported a 39% rise in FY26 revenue to Rs 1,067.5 crore, while profit surged over ten-fold to Rs 60.3 crore. Strong growth in contract manufacturing and Developer-as-a-Service businesses, improved margins and positive cash flow strengthened the company’s financial position.

title: Bank of England's Bailey sees 'wrestle' with US on stablecoin regulation
summary: Bailey said he was concerned some U.S. stablecoins could not be readily turned into ​dollars without ​going through a ⁠crypto exchange, potentially limiting their convertibility in a crisis.But if stablecoins became widely used for cross-border payments, then during a crisis hard-to-convert ​U.S. st

title: Northern Arc Capital Q4 profit jumps nearly 3-fold to Rs 139 cr
summary: The NBFC firm had earned a net profit of Rs 47 crore in the same quarter a year ago.The total income rose to Rs 735 crore in the January-March period of the 2025-26 financial year from Rs 593 crore in the year-ago period, Northern Arc Capital said in a regulatory filing.

title: RBI eases rules for banks to include quarterly profits in regulatory capital
summary: The Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Fifth Amendment Directions, 2026 said a bank may reckon the profits in the current financial year for capital to risk weighted assets ratio (CRAR) calculation on a quarterly basis subject to certain conditions, inclu

title: Ujjivan SFB Q4 profit jumps 238% on strong asset quality; CreditAccess Grameen PAT soars 7-fold
summary: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank reported a 238% rise in Q4 net profit to Rs 282 crore, supported by business growth, improved asset quality and stronger collections. Deposits and assets under management expanded steadily, while the bank approved a Rs 2,000 crore fundraising plan for FY27.

title: Niva Bupa Health Insurance Company Q4 Results: Profit surges 67% to Rs 345 crore
summary: The company's total income during the quarter rose to Rs 2,078 crore against Rs 1,565 crore in the year-ago period, Niva Bupa Health Insurance said in a regulatory filing.

title: US stocks today: S&P 500, Nasdaq hit fresh peaks as tech stocks, jobs data lift sentiment
summary: U.S. stocks surged at Friday's open, driven by a robust employment report that alleviated concerns about a cooling labor market. A rebound in chipmaker stocks further boosted investor sentiment, leading to gains across major indices. The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all saw significant increases in

title: Bank of Baroda posts record Q4 profit despite higher provisions
summary: Bank of Baroda reported a record Q4 net profit of Rs 5,616 crore, driven by higher net interest income and improved asset quality. Despite increased provisions, the bank strengthened balance sheet metrics, announced FY27 growth guidance and approved a Rs 6,000 crore capital raising plan
